name: Jiangsu Sanfangxiang Industry Co., Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Sanfangxiang Industry Co., Ltd engages in the chemical fiber, textiles, printed and dyed fabrics, and chemical businesses. Its products include canvas materials, chemical fibers, plastic engineering parts, and tarpaulins and canvas products, as well as corduroy, cotton and linen blended, nylon, plain cotton, poplin, printed cotton, ramie, rayon, satin/satinette, stretch, twill, and woven fabrics; and industrial used plastics/polymers/resins. Jiangsu Sanfangxiang Industry Co., Ltd was founded in 1994 and is based in Jiangyin, China.
